questions.question: What does the feedback runner force the agent to do?
questions.questionZh: 反馈运行器（Feedback Runner）会强制智能体（Agent）执行什么操作？
options: React to facts: structured stdout/stderr/exit/duration records captured into the loop on every command
optionsZh: 响应事实：每次执行命令时，将结构化的标准输出(stdout)、标准错误(stderr)、退出状态码(exit)及耗时(duration)记录捕获至执行循环中。
questions.explanation: The runner closes the gap between 'tests passed' (imagined) and 'tests actually ran and exited zero' (recorded).
questions.explanationZh: 运行器（runner）弥合了“测试通过”（预期）与“测试实际运行且退出码为 0”（实际记录）之间的差距。

questions.question: How does feedback differ from telemetry?
questions.questionZh: 反馈 (feedback) 与遥测 (telemetry) 有何区别？
options: Feedback is for the next turn of this run; telemetry is for operators reviewing runs across time (different files, different retention)
Telemetry uses OTel; feedback uses GraphQL
optionsZh: 反馈 (Feedback) 用于指导当前运行 (Run) 的下一轮次 (Turn)；遥测 (Telemetry) 则供运维人员 (Operators) 跨时间维度审查历史运行记录（涉及不同的文件与数据保留策略 (Retention)）。
遥测 (Telemetry) 采用 OpenTelemetry (OTel)；反馈 (Feedback) 采用 GraphQL。
questions.explanation: Both share fields but live in different files with different retention; feedback is intra-run, telemetry is cross-run.
questions.explanationZh: 两者共享相同的字段，但存储在不同的文件中，且数据保留策略（retention）不同；反馈（feedback）针对单次运行内（intra-run），而遥测数据（telemetry）则用于跨运行（cross-run）。

questions.question: Which field MUST appear in every feedback record?
questions.questionZh: 每个反馈记录中必须包含哪个字段？
options: exit_code (and a null exit must refuse to advance the loop)
optionsZh: `exit_code`（且空退出（null exit）必须拒绝推进循环）
questions.explanation: exit_code is the unambiguous success signal; null exit means no progress.
questions.explanationZh: `exit_code` 是明确的执行成功信号；`null exit` 表示未取得任何进展。

questions.question: How does the runner truncate large outputs?
questions.questionZh: 运行器（Runner）如何截断大型输出？
options: Deterministic head + tail with a 'truncated N lines' marker so the same output always produces the same record
optionsZh: 采用确定性（Deterministic）的首尾截取（Head + Tail）方式，并附带“截断 N 行”标记，以确保相同的输出始终生成相同的记录。
questions.explanation: Deterministic truncation keeps records replayable while bounding token cost; tails carry the failure summary.
questions.explanationZh: 确定性截断（Deterministic truncation）在控制 Token 成本的同时确保记录可重放；尾部包含失败摘要。

questions.question: Why redact at write time rather than read time?
questions.questionZh: 为什么选择在写入时（write time）进行脱敏（redact），而不是在读取时（read time）？
options: The file on disk is what an attacker reaches; redacting only on read leaves secrets in JSONL files
optionsZh: 攻击者实际访问的是磁盘上的文件；若仅在读取时进行脱敏（redaction），敏感信息（secrets）仍会残留在 JSONL 文件中。
读取时脱敏（Read-time Redaction）会破坏 JSON 格式
questions.explanation: Redact lines matching Bearer, password=, api_key=, AKIA..., xox[baprs]- before append; auditing the patterns quarterly.
questions.explanationZh: 在追加前，对匹配 Bearer、password=、api_key=、AKIA...、xox[baprs]- 的行进行脱敏（Redaction）处理；并每季度对这些匹配模式（Patterns）进行审计（Auditing）。

questions.question: What does parent_command_id give the workbench?
options: Retries link to their parent attempt so the reviewer and audit see the failure chain; without it retries look like independent successes
optionsZh: 重试（Retries）会关联至其父级尝试（parent attempt），以便审查者（reviewer）与审计（audit）能够查看完整的失败链（failure chain）；若无此关联，重试操作将看似彼此独立的成功执行。
questions.explanation: Parent linkage makes retry chains visible to the reviewer (Lesson 39) and the verification gate.
questions.explanationZh: 父级关联 (Parent linkage) 使重试链 (Retry chains) 对审核员 (Reviewer)（第 39 课）和验证门禁 (Verification gate) 可见。

questions.question: Why cap feedback_record.jsonl at 1 MB with rotation?
questions.questionZh: 为什么将 feedback_record.jsonl 的大小上限设置为 1 MB 并启用轮转 (rotation)？
options: JSON does not handle larger files
The agent only reads the current file; rotation keeps runtime cost bounded while CI artifacts capture the full set
optionsZh: JSON 不适合处理较大文件
代理（Agent）仅读取当前文件；轮转（Rotation）机制可将运行时开销（Runtime Cost）控制在有限范围内，而 CI 制品（CI Artifacts）则负责捕获完整文件集。
服务提供商按字节计费
questions.explanation: Bounded current file + rotated history is the same pattern logrotate uses; predictable cost in the hot loop.
questions.explanationZh: 限制大小的当前文件 + 轮转历史记录，这与 logrotate 采用的模式一致；在热循环 (hot loop) 中的性能开销可预测。
